descriptors: Absent — no evidence of structured capability
Emerging — documented, repeatable in pilots, partial adoption

dimensions.name: Executive Alignment
gaps: Not linked to budget or OKRs
remediation: Tie governance KPIs to annual plan; assign budget owners
quickWins: Draft governance OKRs for next quarter
Assign budget owners for oversight KPIs
longLead: Embed oversight KPIs into compensation cycles
Publish a governance charter with authority paths

dimensions.name: Authority Mapping
gaps: Decision rights unclear for incident mode
remediation: Produce before/after authority map; define decisive-mode path
longLead: Baseline authority map and change-management rollout
Train incident coordinators on decisive-mode playbook

dimensions.name: Incentive Alignment
gaps: No KPIs linking oversight to compensation
remediation: Adopt KPI examples; run pilot in one org unit
quickWins: Run a KPI-aligned incentive pilot in one unit
longLead: Institutionalize KPI linkage into performance cycles
Align budget planning with governance KPIs

dimensions.name: Pilot Management
evidence: Pilot charters used in other programs
gaps: No scale-up gates for governance pilots
remediation: Add scale criteria to pilot charter; ownership for institutionalization
quickWins: Add scale-up gates to pilot charter template
longLead: Institutionalize charter template with governance milestones
Create a standing intake and review cadence
